posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com fam!

If your workflows involve sending proposals, quotes, or contracts, you’ll want to look at PandaDoc’s integration with monday.com.

  • Generate proposals directly from monday.com items.
  • Track document status (sent, viewed, signed) inside your board.
  • Automate next steps—like moving a deal forward when a contract is signed.

It’s a smooth way to cut down admin work and speed up your sales process.

Explore PandaDoc here!
